backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Sanctuary type and CRUD operations (add, get, filter by day/month/year, get all) stored in an in-memory Map keyed by name+date.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three 3D fighting game features (3D scene, ported game logic, 3D particles) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each file's purpose in the 3D fighting game and calendar/sanctuary app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Calendar & Sanctuaries App' that mounts the React app at the #root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a dark-themed page with a header showing 'UG vs SUKUNA', the FightingGame component, and a caffeine.ai footer.
frontend/src/components/Character3D.tsx: React Three Fiber component that renders a 3D character from box/sphere geometries, animates attack/hit states, and maps game coordinates to 3D world space.
frontend/src/components/FightingGame.tsx: Main fighting game component using React Three Fiber Canvas; drives the game loop updating player, enemy, and particle state, and renders health bars, overlays, and Scene3D.
frontend/src/components/OnScreenControls: Renders touch/mouse-friendly on-screen game controls (directional, jump, punch, kick buttons) that update a shared keysRef for game input. Includes SVG icons for punch and kick actions.
frontend/src/components/ParticleSystem3D: Renders up to 200 game particles as instanced 3D spheres using Three.js, updating position, scale, and color each frame based on particle life and properties.
frontend/src/components/Scene3D.tsx: Composes the 3D fight arena scene including lighting, animated floor/pillars, a dynamic camera rig that keeps both characters in view, and renders player/enemy characters with particles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarState.ts: Custom hook managing calendar view state (year/month), computing a 42-day grid of CalendarDay objects with week numbers, and providing navigation helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLoop.ts: Custom hook that drives a game loop using requestAnimationFrame, calling update and render callbacks each frame with a capped delta time.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useKeyboardControls.t: Custom hook that listens for keyboard events and maintains a ref-based KeyState object mapping arrow/WASD/action keys to boolean pressed states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all sanctuaries, fetching sanctuaries by month, and adding a new sanctuary via the ICP backend actor, with timestamp conversion utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Bebas Neue, Rajdhani), sets up Tailwind directives, defines a dark fighting-game OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, and provides custom component classes for game UI elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the fighting game, including enums for GameStatus, AttackType, and FacingDirection, plus interfaces for Character, Enemy, GameState, Particle, and KeyState.
frontend/src/utils/combatSystem.ts: Handles combat logic including hit detection between player and enemy using attack hitboxes, damage calculation, knockback, particle spawning on hits, and game status updates (game over or new enemy creation on defeat).
frontend/src/utils/enemyAI.ts: Implements enemy AI state machine with approach, attack, retreat, and stagger states, applying gravity, movement, and attack timing based on distance to the player each frame.
frontend/src/utils/gamePhysics.ts: Provides player physics (movement, jumping, gravity, wall bounds), attack application logic, attack hitbox calculation, and a rectangle overlap utility for collision detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Bebas Neue, Rajdhani), OKLCH-based color tokens, glow box shadows, border radius variables, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, and a list of existing implemented features for the application, which includes a calendar UI and a 2D fighting game.
